rewards.name: Early Bird Special
rewards.description: One Smart Garden Sensor at 40% off retail price. Shipping included.

rewards.name: Standard Pack
rewards.description: One Smart Garden Sensor at early-bird pricing with extended warranty.

rewards.name: Pro Bundle
rewards.description: Three Smart Garden Sensors plus the companion app lifetime subscription.

rewards.name: Digital Download
rewards.description: Full album digital download in high-quality FLAC format.

rewards.name: Limited Vinyl
rewards.description: Signed vinyl pressing with custom album art.

rewards.name: VIP Concert Access
rewards.description: VIP tickets to the album release concert plus backstage meet & greet.

rewards.name: Honey Taster Box
rewards.description: A curated box of 4 artisan honey varieties from our pilot hives.

rewards.name: Starter Kit
rewards.description: Complete urban beekeeping starter kit with guide book and tools.

rewards.name: Base Game
rewards.description: One copy of Pixel Quest base game with all standard components.

rewards.name: Deluxe Edition
rewards.description: Deluxe edition with metal coins, neoprene mat, and expansion pack.

rewards.name: Streaming Access
rewards.description: Online streaming access to the full documentary for one year.

rewards.name: Poster + Streaming
rewards.description: Limited edition poster plus streaming access.

rewards.name: Digital Copy
rewards.description: Digital download of the full game on release day.

rewards.name: Collector's Box
rewards.description: Physical collector's edition with art book and soundtrack CD.

rewards.name: Basic Jacket
rewards.description: One TechWear jacket in your choice of color.

rewards.name: Pro Jacket + Accessories
rewards.description: Jacket plus matching gloves and beanie.

rewards.name: App Access
rewards.description: One year of premium app access for cataloging your vinyl collection.

rewards.name: Collector Kit
rewards.description: Premium cleaning kit plus lifetime app access.

rewards.name: Starter SCOBY
rewards.description: Live SCOBY with basic instructions for home brewing.

rewards.name: Complete Kit
rewards.description: Full kombucha brewing kit with SCOBY, jars, tea, and flavoring.

updates.title: Supply Chain Update
updates.body: Due to supplier delays with our sensor components, production has been pushed back by three weeks. We are working to resolve the issue but some reward deliveries may be delayed.

updates.title: Recording Progress
updates.body: All tracks are recorded and mixing is underway. We are on schedule for a September release.

updates.title: Art Finalization
updates.body: Final card art and rulebook are being reviewed by our playtesters. Everything looks great for our December ship date.

updates.title: Hive Installation
updates.body: Our pilot hives are thriving and we have started harvesting our first batch of honey. Taster boxes will be the freshest yet!

updates.title: Alpha Testing
updates.body: Alpha testing is going well. We are 72% to our goal and need more backers to reach the finish line.
